ogTitle: Yourdamung Lake vs Yuna: Climate Safety

heading: Yourdamung Lake vs Yuna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yourdamung Lake, Western Australia and Yuna, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yourdamung Lake has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Yuna (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yourdamung Lake or Yuna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yourdamung Lake has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Yuna scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yourdamung Lake scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Yuna scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yourdamung Lake or Yuna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yourdamung Lake has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
